channel.title: Personal on Damon Miao
channel.description: Recent content in Personal on Damon Miao

item.title: Hello, World
item.description:
Welcome to my site. This is the first post — a placeholder while things get set up.

I plan to write here about AI, language models, reasoning, and whatever else I find worth thinking through carefully.

More soon.

Published: Mar 26, 2026, 09:00
